scenario.name: SIP_basic_call
scenario.send:
INVITE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: urn:service:sos Call-ID: [call_id] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Call-Info: <urn:emergency:uid:callid:123ABCdefg123ABCdefg123ABCdefg12:test.com>;purpose=emergency-CallId Call-Info: <urn:emergency:uid:incidentid:123ABCdefg123ABCdefg123ABCdefg12:test.com>;purpose=emergency-IncidentId Resource-Priority: esnet.1 Geolocation-Routing: yes Geolocation: <cid:defaultlocation@[local_ip]> Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=next-content Content-Length: [len]
--next-content Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Content-ID: <defaultlocation@[local_ip]> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" xmlns:gp="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10" xmlns:bp="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10:basicPolicy" xmlns:ca="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10:civicAddr" xmlns:gs="http://www.opengis.net/pidflo/1.0" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml" entity="sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]"> <tuple id="0"> <status> <gp:geopriv> <gp:location-info> <gml:Point srsName="urn:ogc:def:crs:EPSG::4326"> <gml:pos>40.71668300756087 -73.99069756654683</gml:pos> </gml:Point> </gp:location-info> </gp:geopriv> </status> <timestamp>2050-05-15T12:30:00Z</timestamp> </tuple> </presence>
--next-content Content-Type: application/sdp v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
--next-content--

ACK urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: urn:service:sos[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

BYE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: urn:service:sos[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
